title: PressForce Property
description:
This property sets the force to press.

The robot presses to be the force specified by the PressForce property in PressOrient direction during the execution of SurfaceAlign object.

When pressing to positive direction, value will be negative.

When pressing to negative direction, value will be positive.

Values

When PressOrient is positive direction:

Minimum value -50

Maximum value 0

When PressOrient is negative direction:

Minimum value 0

Maximum value 50

Default:  -5

See Also: PressForce Property

PressOrient Property
see_also:
Applies To

SurfaceAlign Object, PressProbe Object
